  "findings": [
    "No confined space attendant (hole watch) posted at the entry point while the space is in service/occupied.",
    "Failure to monitor the safety of entrants and maintain continuous communication."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Order an immediate evacuation of all personnel currently inside the confined space.",
    "Barricade the entrance to prevent re-entry.",
    "Do not allow re-entry until a qualified, designated attendant is posted at the entrance and all permit conditions are met."
  ],
  "rationale": "Under OSHA 1910.146, a permit-required confined space must have a designated, trained attendant (hole watch) stationed outside the space at all times during entry operations. Operating without an attendant is a critical safety violation that exposes entrants to immediate, life-threatening hazards without a means of rescue or continuous monitoring.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1910.146(d)(6)",
    "OSHA 1910.146(i)"
  ]
}
